differential_diagnoses: Cushing syndrome (likely ectopic ACTH or adrenal carcinoma)
next_steps: Initiate empiric anti-tuberculous therapy, intravenous dexamethasone, and antifungal therapy pending further results
Send CSF for Mycobacterium tuberculosis PCR and culture, cryptococcal antigen, fungal culture, and cytology
Measure plasma fractionated metanephrines to rule out pheochromocytoma
Order serum ACTH, morning cortisol, and 24-hour urinary free cortisol to characterize Cushing syndrome
Perform chest/abdomen/pelvis staging for potential metastatic disease or granulomatous processes
Maintain high-pressure management of CSF via serial lumbar punctures or external ventricular drain if needed
Review Vagus Nerve Stimulator MRI compatibility documentation to determine if advanced neuroimaging is possible
